notes: Unified Main Menu and Ending scenes into the same full-screen UMD line-based interface as the hub, role creation, event and battle scenes.
Rebuilt the Main Menu into a pure in-game three-column layout with save preview, launch instructions, world intro and release intel panels.
Rebuilt the Ending scene into a true in-game result screen with left status column, center ending summary and right follow-up intel panel, while keeping side drawers and game windows active.
Hardened the profile and admin windows so they no longer error when opened before a character is created.
